title: Delicate Cluster
content:
Delicate cluster! flag of teeming life!
Covering all my lands! all my sea-shores lining!
Flag of death! (how I watch'd you through the smoke of battle pressing!
How I heard you flap and rustle, cloth defiant!)
Flag cerulean! sunny flag! with the orbs of night dappled!
Ah my silvery beauty! ah my woolly white and crimson!
Ah to sing the song of you, my matron mighty!
My sacred one, my mother.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walt Whitman delivers a powerful performance in "Delicate Cluster"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
